Artifacts

Technical source view for canonical files, automations, gaps, gates, and source map.

Autonomy And Automation

Automation is mechanism; autonomy is approved scope plus contract, evidence, gates, stop rules, and audit.

Current autonomyAutomation presentStanding
Level 4 Senior Staff (Scoped Autonomy); Level 5 policy defined-not-active with source conflict; Level 6 native loop defined-not-active`vik-visible-backlog-research` active 30-minute visible backlog heartbeat and now calls `roles/vik/scripts/level5automation.py`; `vik-daily-role-memory-maintenance` active daily cron; `vik-handoff-check` queue/file-watch sidecar pausedCurrent standing remains Level 4 for scoped research backlog loops because Vik's canonical `Autonomy.md` still says Level 5 is defined-not-active. Level 5 reports exist, but the source flags a conflict until Scott/Vik/Tess reconcile and activate the canonical contract plus runtime gates, eval proof, observation, audit, rollback, and revocation. No implementation, procurement, vendor contact, Git/release, production, spending, secrets, external communication, or authority expansion.
